description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a modern, open floor plan, including multiple rooms and a central living area. The exterior is finished with a combination of dark and light wall panels, complemented by large windows that allow ample natural light. A fenced yard surrounds the property, with a small porch at the front and a patio area at the rear, which includes a round pool or hot tub. The roof is flat, enhancing the contemporary architectural style, and the property is bordered by a mix of wooden and metal fencing. The interior appears to be divided into distinct living, dining, and bedroom spaces, with visible furniture and decor elements. The overall design emphasizes functionality, privacy, and outdoor connectivity, making it suitable for urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, fenced yard, and a mix of dark and light exterior panels. Features include a front porch, rear patio with a pool, and open-plan interior spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch, and a clear view into the living and dining areas.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard patio, round pool, and extensive window arrangements.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the depth of the bungalow, side fencing, and a glimpse of interior room divisions.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the rear facade, flat roof, and the arrangement of windows and patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
